name: cron-dashboard-alert-scan
description: Every 15 minutes, ask the OpenClaw cron dashboard to scan jobs and fire any Discord alerts that are over threshold.

payload.message:
Run this single command and report back the result:

```
curl -s -m 10 http://localhost:3737/api/alerts | head -c 2000
```

That's it. The endpoint returns JSON like `{"webhookConfigured": true|false, "scanned": N, "results": [...]}`. If `webhookConfigured` is false, mention that the user needs to set DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL. If any alerts fired, summarize them. Keep the reply to one short paragraph — this is a status check, not a build.
